title.en: But there are no absolutes, and there are alway...

content.en:
Situations like those ten half-step True Ancestors were playing out one by one in the Infinite Abyss Fragment Ruins, and almost no one could escape any of them who encountered that kind of abyssal monster with intelligence.

But there are no absolutes, and there are always people who are exceptions.

In the middle of a mountain range in the Infinite Abyss.

The Ghost Shadow True Monarch is fleeing rapidly, he continues to condense one ghost shadow after another to escape in all directions, each ghost shadow is the same as the main body, this is his most proud escape secret technique, can turn into three thousand shadows, the enemy is difficult to distinguish in a short time.

This gave him hope of escaping!

At this time, there was an Abyss Demon Cat jumping in the void behind him, and with each jump, one of the ghost clones of the Ghost Shadow True Monarch would be killed.

Once the ghost clone is killed, the power of the Ghost Shadow True Monarch will continue to be lost, and once the ghost shadow clone is killed too much, the strength of the Ghost Shadow True Monarch will be permanently lost, and it will take a long time to be able to re-cultivate back.

But in order to avoid the strange and terrifying abyss demon cat, he must do so, or he will surely die.

He could feel that once he was caught up, the life-saving things on his body would not be able to save his life at all, the strength of the other party was too strong, and it was very weird, and the abyssal demonic energy could instantly wipe him out.

"Damn, how can there be such a powerful abyss monster!"

Ghost Shadow True Monarch wondered.

He had also encountered a lot of abyssal monsters before, although he was not weak, but with his strength, he could still kill them, but this time the abyss monsters he encountered in a certain ruin were like real cultivators, they definitely possessed wisdom, and their understanding of the Great Dao was too deep, far surpassing him.

That's why he doesn't have any defense.

Originally, there were a few half-step True Ancestors with him, but this time they were all dead, and he was the only one left.

With the passage of time, after consuming a large number of ghost clones and greatly reducing his strength, the Ghost Shadow True Monarch finally got rid of the weird abyss demon cat.

At the same time, he passed this information on to the other half-step True Ancestors of the Dark Temple.

Gradually, this news spread out completely, and one after another, half-step True Ancestors encountered intelligent abyss monsters, and the news was completely leaked.

......

The ruins of the Abyss, in an underground palace.

Abyssal monsters gathered here, their eyes full of wisdom light, and they were all intelligent abyss monsters.

The strength of these abyss monsters is very strong, although none of them go beyond the category of half-step true ancestors, but each of them is far beyond the ordinary half-step true ancestors, comparable to some genius-level true ancestor early stage powerhouses.

Suddenly.

An abyssal monster with a height of 100 feet and two horns on the top of his head appeared, his eyes scanned the surroundings, and one after another abyssal monsters lowered their noble heads.

According to the division of the Infinite Abyss, this is an abyss monster whose strength is infinitely close to the lord level - the Abyss Bull Demon!

Strictly speaking, this Abyss Bull Demon has a powerful Abyss bloodline, and its potential is very strong, and its strength is far stronger than that of some new Abyss Lords.

If the abyss is still the previous abyss, this abyss bull demon is definitely the top nobleman of the abyss, and his status is far above the ordinary lord.

"Meet Lord Morn!"

"Meet Lord Morn!"

"Meet Lord Morn!"

An abyssal monster bowed, his tone full of respect.

"Kitten, I heard that you let go of a half-step True Ancestor cultivator, causing our existence to be exposed?" said Abyss Bull Demon Morn in a cold voice.

Wow!

An Abyss Demon Cat trembled and stood up, and said in fear: "Lord Morn, that cultivator can transform into three thousand shadows, almost the same as the main body, I can't tell it in a short time, although my speed is very fast, but I didn't kill his main body every time, and finally he escaped!"

"Humph!"

Morn snorted coldly, and the Abyss Demon Cat coughed up blood and lay on the ground, obviously not lightly injured, it can be seen from this that the Abyss Bull Demon Morn is so powerful.

"Forget it this time!" Morn said in a deep voice, "Sooner or later, our existence will still be exposed, and the sooner it is exposed, it will be exposed." You should be aware that our Imperial Beast Sect has been researching abyss monsters, which is taboo in the Divine Heaven Realm. Now, in order to avoid the calamity of shuttling through the Dark Forbidden Domain, the people of our Imperial Beast Sect fused with the abyss monsters to resist the power of the Dark Forbidden Domain, so that they could survive three percent of the sect's disciples. And those disciples of the sect who are in the Triple Heaven Force, I am afraid that they will be able to survive a good achievement. This is the advantage of our Imperial Beast Sect, but this is a forbidden method after all, once it is known by other forces, our Imperial Beast Sect will be in trouble!"

"Lord Morn, one-fifth of the territory of the Domain Realm was forcibly thrown into the Dark Forbidden Realm by the Realm Lord with supreme power, and he shuttled through the Dark Forbidden Realm to this strange realm, and the major forces suffered heavy casualties, how can they have the heart to take care of the affairs of our Imperial Beast Sect again!" an abyss monster spoke.

"Don't forget, the Realm Lord forcibly threw one-fifth of the realm territory in order to preserve his strength, and the forces under the command of the Realm Lord may also survive a lot, if they find out about the situation of our Imperial Beast Sect, I am afraid they will not spare our Imperial Beast Sect, the plan now is to completely transform this abyss fragment, master here, and establish our abyss monster force here, so that other forces will not dare to trouble us! This is a new era, and it is also a new hope for the rise of our Imperial Beast Sect. Even in the future, our Imperial Beast Sect will be able to become the Upper Triple Heaven Force, or even surpass the Upper Triple Heaven Force!"

What Mo En said made all the disciples of the Imperial Beast Sect excited, but some people knew very well that the foundation of the Imperial Beast Sect was too low and too low, and the reason why they dared to enter the abyss was also to take advantage of the fact that the abyss was penetrated, and the powerful abyss monster was cleaned up again, otherwise the Imperial Beast Sect would not have had a chance to launch such an opportunity!

Of course, the current Imperial Beast Sect cannot be regarded as a cultivator force, but an abyss monster force.

The abyssal monsters under the True Ancestor are just monsters, but if they are the abyss monsters at the True Ancestor level, they are no longer monsters, but abyss nobles, and they are abyss demons.

In the Divine Heaven Realm, there are also such abyss demon forces, but they are no longer in their domain.

If they let the Imperial Beast Sect continue to develop like this, they can also become the Abyss Demon Clan's forces.

"Lord Morn, now that many half-step True Ancestors in this strange realm have entered our Imperial Beast Abyss, how should we deal with it?"

An Abyss Monster of the Royal Beast Sect asked.

Named after the Imperial Beast Abyss, it can be seen that the Imperial Beast Sect really completely regarded this place as their base camp.

"Let's take a look!" Morn said, "They are all on the periphery of the Beast Abyss now, as long as they don't go deep into the inner area, we don't care about them." But if they dare to break into the inner area, then kill them all!Besides, hurry up and arrange the Imperial Beast Abyss, once the entire Imperial Beast Abyss is completely under the cover of our Imperial Beast Sect's great array, we can slowly transform this place until we completely control everything here! Before the elders and sect masters wake up, we must make certain achievements, understand?"

"Yes!"

Many abyssal monsters answered one by one.
